recommendation.summary: No hours logged yet this week — and you're leaving for Ann Arbor tomorrow, so today is your only SF window. Start with a Bay Club session this morning to anchor health before travel, then handle one professional task (application or outreach) before you go; don't let the transition eat the week.

suggested.title: Bay Club — morning session before travel
